title: Plumeet Small Wall Clock, 10 Inch Battery Operated Wall Clock with Aluminum Frame, Non Ticking Silent Metal Wall Clocks Decorative Kitchen Living Room Bedroom, Black
features: Made of Aluminum: Unlike other cheap plastic wall clock, both the clock face and frame of Plumeet wall clock are made of aluminum. we over-deliver on quality and reliability. Brushed frame adds style and longevity to any decor.

Exceptional Movement - The quartz movement has been repeatedly tested to ensure complete silence. which will completely farewell the annoying ticking sound. This will create a quiet environment for you to sleep and work.
Vintage Style -- Antique and vintage style decoration, with practical and beautiful combination. clear display and convenient to read time with large number inside, very aesthetically pleasing.
Easy install -- Come with a very easy installation kit included, securely hangs on your wall within a few seconds. Powered by 1*AA battery (not included).
Easy to Use: Simple, easy to read style fits any decor and is easy to read - plumeet modern wall clocks also serve as kitchen, living room, bathroom, bedroom and office wall decor.
